title: Charity golf day beckons
description: KNYSNA NEWS - Century 21 Knysna is excited...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Century 21 Knysna is excited to announce the upcoming Property Practitioners Cup, a charity golf day in aid of the Loeriehof old age home, taking place on 20 October at the Knysna Golf Club.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Century 21 Knysna is excited to announce the upcoming Property Practitioners Cup, a charity golf day in aid of the Loeriehof old age home, taking place on 20 October at the Knysna Golf Club."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"This fun and competitive event will bring together estate agents and local businesses, all while raising funds for a very important cause."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With participants from across the real estate industry, this promises to be a great networking opportunity for local companies.","html":"With participants from across the real estate industry, this promises to be a great networking opportunity for local companies."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We are inviting businesses to sponsor a hole for R1 500, allowing them to display their branding and set up a stand at one of the holes, engaging directly with participants throughout the day.","html":"We are inviting businesses to sponsor a hole for R1 500, allowing them to display their branding and set up a stand at one of the holes, engaging directly with participants throughout the day."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Worthy cause"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We're also encouraging local professionals and businesses to enter a team in the competition. It's not just about golf - it's about community, fun, and giving back.","html":"We're also encouraging local professionals and businesses to enter a team in the competition. It's not just about golf - it's about community, fun, and giving back."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Whether you're a seasoned golfer or just want to enjoy a day out with colleagues and friends, this is the perfect opportunity to support a worthy cause.","html":"Whether you're a seasoned golfer or just want to enjoy a day out with colleagues and friends, this is the perfect opportunity to support a worthy cause."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"To participate as a sponsor or competitor, or for more information on how you can get involved, please contact us at [email protected]","html":"To participate as a sponsor or competitor, or for more information on how you can get involved, please contact us at [email protected]"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Don't miss out on this exciting day of golf, camaraderie, and community support!"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Golf day organiser Del-Monte Roberts, the Century21 office manager.","html":"Golf day organiser Del-Monte Roberts, the Century21 office manager."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
